hero.description: I’m <name>Joskua Olivares</name> — a senior software engineer with strong <accent>product sense</accent>. I help founders and teams design, build, and ship <accent>web apps</accent>, <accent>mobile apps</accent>, and internal systems that are <accent>reliable</accent>, <accent>usable</accent>, and <accent>ready for production</accent>.

whyWorkWithMe.title: Why Teams Work With Me

points.title: I translate business needs into working software
points.description: I focus on <accent>outcomes</accent>, not buzzwords—turning real business problems into <accent>practical</accent>, <accent>scalable</accent> solutions.

points.title: I communicate clearly

points.title: I take ownership and deliver
points.description: I treat products like they’re my own—taking responsibility from <accent>idea</accent> to <accent>production</accent>.

points.title: Experience across startups and enterprise systems
points.description: I’ve worked in <accent>fast-moving startups</accent> and <accent>complex enterprise environments</accent> with real constraints.

whyWorkWithMe.footer: 5+ years shipping production software across <accent>SaaS</accent>, <accent>FinTech</accent>, <accent>logistics</accent>, and <accent>marketing platforms</accent>.

featuredWork.title: Featured Work
featuredWork.subtitle: A few projects where I owned delivery end-to-end, led teams, and shipped production systems.

projects.title: Billboard Planet — Flutter mobile app
projects.subtitle: Senior Engineer · End-to-end ownership
projects.summary: Rebuilt a legacy Android-only app into a modern cross-platform Flutter application used by field teams in the outdoor advertising industry.
projects.bulletsTitle: What it does / My role / Impact
bullets: Helps installers manage work orders (install, remove, switch billboards).
Uploads proof of job completion from the field.
Designed, built, managed, and deployed the app independently.
Used across 4 countries · Adopted by 6 client companies.

projects.title: Nexus — Marketing & Loyalty SaaS
projects.subtitle: Tech Lead · Product & Systems Engineering
projects.summary: Led technical and product execution for a marketing and loyalty SaaS platform used by multiple brands.
bullets: Translated business requirements into technical roadmaps.
Led sprint planning and technical decision-making.

projects.title: Factrónica — Website redesign & rebuild
projects.subtitle: Product delivery · Web
projects.summary: Redesigned and rebuilt an outdated non-responsive HTML site into a modern, mobile-first experience with improved usability and performance.
bullets: Tech: Framer (chosen intentionally for speed and time-to-market).

projects.title: Online Nexus Targeting Portal
projects.subtitle: Rapid delivery · Business-facing portal
projects.summary: Delivered a business-facing portal under tight timelines, prioritizing usability and execution speed with pragmatic tooling choices.
bullets: Tight timelines with rapid iteration cycles.
Focused on usability for business users.
Pragmatic tooling selection for delivery speed.

projects.title: K1 Electrical Contractors Ltd
projects.subtitle: End-to-end delivery · Small business website
projects.summary: Delivered a maintainable, responsive website emphasizing clarity, structure, and long-term ease of updates.

about.title: About Me
about.description1: Hi, I’m Joskua — a freelance developer based in Mexico City. I believe that technology should make life easier, smarter, and more human.
about.description2: Over the past 5+ years, I’ve worked with teams across the US, Mexico, Central America and Asia, building real-world systems that power loyalty programs, optimize business processes, and bring ideas to life.
about.description3: I’ve led development teams, launched cross-platform apps, and integrated solutions with POS systems and payment platforms — always with a focus on clean code, usability, and impact.
about.languages: Languages I speak fluently: Spanish, English, French

about.imageAlt: Technology consultant collaborating with Mexican small-business owners on digital solutions

items.question: How much does it cost to digitize my business?
items.answer: It depends on scope. First we prioritize the problem, then propose stages.

items.question: How long does it take to see results?
items.answer: A landing page can launch in days; deeper integrations take weeks.

items.question: I am not technical. Will I be able to use it?
items.answer: Yes. The solution adapts to your operation and includes guidance.

items.question: Will my business own the delivered system?
items.answer: The proposal defines ownership and access. After delivery and payment, the client controls the agreed assets.

items.question: What happens after launch?
items.answer: Launch support is included. Ongoing maintenance is scoped separately.

items.question: Can you integrate with the systems we already use?
items.answer: In many cases, yes. I first review access, data, APIs, and technical limits.
